kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens a fresh browser and navigates to the SauceDemo login page. Intended to be called once, in Suite Setup, so the same browser window is reused across every test in the suite.

test.name: Standard User Can Purchase One Item

kw.name: Reset To Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Clears any logged-in session (cookies + local/session storage) and returns to the login page.

kw.name: Login Should Succeed
Login As
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

Fills in the username and password fields and clicks Login. Does NOT check the result — use "Login Should Succeed" or "Login Should Fail With Message" instead, unless you specifically need the raw action on its own.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
Logs in with the given credentials and verifies the login worked by confirming the Products page title is visible. Use this for POSITIVE test cases (valid accounts).

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css:.complete-header' contains exact text 'Thank you for your order!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

test.doc: Logs in, adds an item to the cart, completes checkout, and verifies the order succeeds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
